Package battleship.model

Class BattleshipGame

java.lang.Object
battleship.model.BattleshipGame
public class BattleshipGame extends Object
The game implementation of Battleship. This class is the model of the game. It can be either used in combination with a view+controller or directly through the JShell. To give a textual representation another method,'moveJ()', is defined. It runs the original move() method but in addition to that give about the game situation of players after each move. ArrayList of Enemy Cards ist for GUI implemented. In JShell it won't be used. To play game in JShel it has to be created two games with different team names. HandCards and GameCards has to be taken over the getters methods from Arraylists. These must be given over as parameter in moveJ() or move() methods.

  • Constructor Details

    • BattleshipGame

      public BattleshipGame(String team)
      Creates a new Game instance with given team. createShips(String team) createMissed(String team) createMissiles(String team) createMayDay(String team)
      Parameters:
      team - team of game.

  • Method Details

    • move

      public void move(Cards handC, Cards playedOn)
      Depending on the played card and the card, on which played, it is called the moveE() method or moveO() method. This method is the main game move method, and it is used in GUI. It also checks whether the gameOver or not. It gives also textual information for JShell. moveE(Cards handC, Cards enemy) moveO(Cards handC, Cards ownCard)
      Parameters:
      handC - the played card.
      playedOn - ownCard or enemyCard, on which the hand card is played.

    • moveJ

      public void moveJ(Cards handC, Cards playedOn, BattleshipGame bsEnemy)
      This method is the main game move method for JShell. It calls directly the main move() method. It gives also textual information of Game instance for JShell. move(Cards handC, Cards playedOn)
      Parameters:
      handC - the played card.
      playedOn - ownCard or enemyCard, on which the hand card is played.
      bsEnemy - the Game instance of enemy.

    • isGameOver

      public boolean isGameOver()
      Returns if the game over is. Checks the number of sank ships of enemy. If it is 5, it gives the information.
      Returns:
      the number of sank ships of enemy.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      A textual representation about the current game state. Both the situation of EnemyCards and OwnCards. For example: GameCards of blue [][][][] [][][][] [][][][] HandCards of blue [R2][R1][W1][R2](S) GameCards of red [][][][] [][][][] [][][][] HandCards of red [W1][R1][W1][W1][R2] printGameCards() printHandCards()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      information of the game state.

    • getGameCards

      public ArrayList<Cards> getGameCards()
      Returns the LIST of GameCards. It includes 'ships' and 'missed out cards'.
      Returns:
      the list of gameCards.

    • getHandCards

      public ArrayList<Cards> getHandCards()
      Returns the LIST of HandCards. It includes 'missile' or 'mayday cards'. They are in Hand and for playing on enemy card or own card.
      Returns:
      the list of handCards.

    • getEnemyCards

      public ArrayList<Cards> getEnemyCards()
      Returns the LIST of EnemyCards. It includes 'ships' or 'missed out cards'. It is used in GUI version. The by enemy over network communication received cardList on this list saved.
      Returns:
      the list of enemyCards.

    • setEnemyCards

      public void setEnemyCards(ArrayList<Cards> enemyCards)
      Set the enemyCards list. It is used in GUI. The by enemy over network communication received cardList by Controller here saved.
      Parameters:
      enemyCards - the list of EnemyCards.

    • getTeam

      public String getTeam()
      Returns the team of the Game Instance.
      Returns:
      the team of the game instance.

    • moveE

      private void moveE(Cards handC, Cards enemy)
      It is the move method to play on enemy card. It has been called by move() and moveJ() methods. Depending on the enemy card, if it is opened or not, it has been called discover() or attack() methods. It gives also textual information for JShell. discover(Cards handC, Cards enemy) attack(Cards handC, Cards enemy)
      Parameters:
      handC - the played card. Here it has to be type 'missile'.
      enemy - the enemy card, on which the hand card is played.

    • moveO

      private void moveO(Cards handC, Cards ownCard)
      It is the move method to play on own card. It has been called by move() and moveJ() methods. If the on played card ship is, depending on the hand card, whether it is 'repair' or 'shield' the ship is repaired with +1 defence or secured with +2 defence. It gives also textual information for JShell.
      Parameters:
      handC - the played card. Here it has to be type 'mayday'.
      ownCard - the enemy card, on which the hand card is played.

    • discover

      private void discover(Cards handC, Cards enemy)
      Depending on the enemyCard situation, if it is not opened, it is called by moveE() method. The enemyCard will be opened with help of this method. If the color of the missile red is it called also attack() method. It gives also textual information for JShell. attack(Cards handC, Cards enemy)
      Parameters:
      handC - the played card. Here it has to be type 'missile'.
      enemy - the enemy card, on which the hand card is played.

    • attack

      private void attack(Cards handC, Cards enemy)
      Depending on the enemyCard situation, if it is opened, it is called by moveE() method. Depending on the color of missile and type of ship, if it is white and ship is submarine, or red and other types of ships, with the help of this method ships lost defence. It also controls, whether the defence of ship is <= 0. If so, set the ship as sank. It also calls the falseAttack() method, when the ship type is submarine and the color of missile red. Because submarines can be only white missiles attacked. If the color of the missile red is it called also attack() method. It gives also textual information for JShell. falseAttack(Cards handC)
      Parameters:
      handC - the played card. Here it has to be type 'missile'.
      enemy - the enemy card, on which the hand card is played.

    • falseAttack

      private void falseAttack(Cards handC)
      When the ship type is submarine and the color of missile red, the player lost its missile and gives no attack on enemy submarine. Because submarines can be only white missiles attacked.
      Parameters:
      handC - the played card. Here it has to be type 'missile' and color of 'red'.

    • repair

      private void repair(Cards ship)
      When player repair card on its struck ship played, the defence of ship will be +1.
      Parameters:
      ship - the own ship card. Here has to be opened and struck.

    • battleshipAdvantage

      private boolean battleshipAdvantage()
      If the battleship of a player is opened by enemy, player has this advantage. So each attack on enemy ship will be +1. For example: If player attacked with red missile with power of 1, it will take 2 defence from enemy ship. It is valid until this ship is sank. Returns, if the player has this advantage, or not.
      Returns:
      boolean value for the battleshipAdvantage.

    • submarine

      private boolean submarine(Cards card)
      Returns if the card is submarine. It is used to attack with white missile or to call falseAttack(), when on submarine with red missile attacked. Returns if the enemy card, on which played, is submarine or not.
      Parameters:
      card - the enemy card, on which the hand card is played.
      Returns:
      boolean value for submarine.

    • isEnemy

      private boolean isEnemy(Cards card)
      Returns if the card, on which played belongs to enemy. It is used either to call moveO() or moveE().
      Parameters:
      card - the card, on which the hand card is played.
      Returns:
      boolean value for enemy.

    • isDiscovered

      private boolean isDiscovered(Cards card)
      Returns if the card, on which played opened. It is used call either discover() or attack() methods.
      Parameters:
      card - the card, on which the hand card is played.
      Returns:
      boolean value for opened.

    • shuffleCards

      private void shuffleCards(List l)
      It is used to shuffle cards. It is used in Constructor when all cards are created and in corresponding list saved.
      Parameters:
      l - list of the cards, that has to be shuffled.

    • createShips

      private void createShips(String team)
      Creates all ship cards of game and saved these in corresponding list.
      Parameters:
      team - team of the game.

    • createMissed

      private void createMissed(String team)
      Creates all missed out cards of game and saved these in corresponding list.
      Parameters:
      team - team of the game.

    • createMissiles

      private void createMissiles(String team)
      Creates all missile cards of game and saved these in corresponding list.
      Parameters:
      team - team of the game.

    • createMayDay

      private void createMayDay(String team)
      Creates all mayday cards of game and saved these in corresponding list.
      Parameters:
      team - team of the game.

    • setHandCards

      private void setHandCards()
      After the cards are created and saved in corresponding lists, with the help of this method in constructor first five play cards are taken and saved in handCards list.

    • toPlayedCards

      private void toPlayedCards(Cards card)
      After each move with this method, played card is sent to playedCards stack and removed from handCards list.

    • takeNewCard

      private void takeNewCard()
      After each move played card is sent to playedCards stack and removed from handCards list. Instead of this card will be new card with help of this method taken from takeCards stack.

    • reloadCards

      private void reloadCards()
      If the all cards in takeCards stack used, would be the played cards as takeCards saved and shuffled.

    • printGameC

      private String printGameC(int start, int end)
      It is called from toString() method. To print the cards in 4*3 Block, textual information of cards is saved in a String. It also controls if the cards opened or ships are sank. When so is, it will be showed in another form.
      Parameters:
      start - index of gameCardsBlock
      end - index of gameCardsBlock
      Returns:
      textual information for gameCards.

    • printGameCards

      private String printGameCards()
      It is called from toString() method. To print the cards in 4*3 Block, textual information of cards is saved in a String.
      Returns:
      textual information for gameCards.

    • printHandCards

      private String printHandCards()
      It is called from toString() method. To print the handCards, textual information of cards is saved in a String.
      Returns:
      textual information for gameCards.
